basic_details.job_title: ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR NBPGR)
basic_details.short_information: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR NBPGR) Recruitment 2026: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Project Scientist - III posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Project Scientist - III: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India/ICAR rules.

qualification.details: Project Scientist - III: Doctoral Degree in Science (Molecular Biology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Botany/ Genetics/ Food Technology/ Life Sciences/ Plant Genetics Resources from a Recognized University or equivalent Degree) Seven years' relevant experience and in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific Activities and Services in the area

salary_details.details: Project Scientist - III: Rs 78,000/- plus 27% HRA per month

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III Recruitment 2026 - Overview
ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR NBPGR Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Scientist - III: Doctoral Degree in Science (Molecular Biology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Botany/ Genetics/ Food Technology/ Life Sciences/ Plant Genetics Resources from a Recognized University or equivalent Degree) Seven years' relevant experience and in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific Activities and Services in the area

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Scientist - III: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India/ICAR rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Scientist - III: Rs 78,000/- plus 27% HRA per month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application deadline as the selection is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Scientist - III at ICAR NBPGR?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Scientist - III position in the ICAR NBPGR recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Scientist - III at ICAR NBPGR?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for Project Scientist - III will receive a salary of Rs 78,000/- plus 27% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Project Scientist - III?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Scientist - III position is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for Project Scientist - III?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Doctoral Degree in relevant Science disciplines with seven years of relevant R&D experience to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Project Scientist - III position at ICAR NBPGR is a Walk-in Interview. No prior online application is required.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Scientist - III post is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ICAR NBPGR Project Scientist - III recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Project Scientist - III position. Candidates can attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their duly filled application form, original documents, and photocopies of age, educational qualifications, experience, and other relevant certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Project Scientist - III?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Scientist - III position at ICAR NBPGR is based solely on a Walk-in Interview.
